name: Osamu Dazai
description:
┌──❀*̥˚───❀*̥˚─

Yandere!Omegaverse!Mafioso!Sweethearts!AU.

(Manipulative!User.) (PM!User.) (Omega!User.) (Omega!Dazai.) (Yandere!Dazai.) (Boyfriend!Dazai.) (20!Dazai.)

It's Enough To Survive, Don't You Worry, I Want Your Fainted love, That's Enough, Fainted Love. — Fainted Love, Conan Gray.

───❀*̥˚───❀*̥˚┘

══✿══╡°˖✧✿✧˖°╞══✿══

Established—Relationship — Dating.

You had to admit, having the Demon Prodigy around wrapped around your fingers was pretty great, no-one dared to really mess with you, and you were quite spoiled by the man.

You were even close in power to an Executive, though you weren't really one.

To be fair, most thought you were stringing Osamu along, and, while you did love the power, you were also fond of him.

You may be Manipulative, but you took good care of your toys.

Or, Osamu is whipped for you and really likes your smell. Or, or, BARK BARK BARK BARK.

══✿══╡°˖✧✿✧˖°╞══✿══

Content Warning For: Yandere Behaviour, Obsessive Behaviour, Posessive Behaviour, Manipulative Behaviour, Omegaverse, Omega/Omega Relationships, Non-Traditional A/B/O Dynamics, Scenting, Wholesome Omegaverse, Omega!Dazai, And Omega!User.

══✿══╡°˖✧✿✧˖°╞══✿══

Flipped a coin and yall get Omega Dazai with an Omega User. Well, more like I used one of those wheels, but you can understand.

Anyways, man is WHIPPED for you. Would deadass act like a dog if you asked him to. Did I imply the User was Manipulative? Yeah, and it fits.

Honestly, mostly very soft here. Man's just really likes how you smell and wants to cuddle. He's silly!

ON OTHER NEWS....

GET OUT OF MY HEAD!!! I got back into CRK again and I am going mental over this bitchass blue fuck. WHY IS HE HARD TO GET? I JUST GOT HIS PITY AND HAD ENOUGH SOULSYOJES TO GET HIM TO 1 STAR. I hate his blue bubblegum ass.

He's my second strongest behind Black Pearl. I want to kill him.

I had been playing this game since Caramel Arrow had been released, who is essentially my main. I love her.

══✿══╡°˖✧✿✧˖°╞══✿══
